      repeat(24, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
      minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
  }
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  // Find all inline JSON‑LD scripts
  document.querySelectorAll('script[type="application/ld+json"]').forEach(function(el) {
    try {
      var data = JSON.parse(el.innerHTML);
      var type = data['@type'];
      var types = [];

      // Normalize @type to an array
      if (Array.isArray(type)) {
        types = type;
      } else if (typeof type === 'string') {
        types = [type];
      }

      // Only modify LocalBusiness or Organization schemas
      if (types.includes('LocalBusiness') || types.includes('Organization')) {
        var changed = false;

        // Add name if missing
        if (!data.name || data.name.trim() === '') {
          data.name = 'Harley Street Injectables'; 
          changed = true;
        }

        // Add image if missing
        if (!data.image || data.image.trim() === '') {
          data.image = 'https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/6602bd113f835747072d983d/16296e39-93bc-4ee7-b931-df91e14504c3/Asset+4.png?format=1500w';  
          changed = true;
        }
        
         // Add telephone if missing
        if (!data.telephone || data.telephone.trim() === '') {
          data.telephone = '+443455485658'; // Replace with your preferred clinic number
          changed = true;
        }
        

        // Write back the updated JSON only if something changed
        if (changed) {
          el.innerHTML = JSON.stringify(data);
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      // Ignore parsing errors
      console.error('Schema update error:', err);
    }
  });
});
